subcodes.first_line: O my God! This is a handmaiden who hath believed in the Beauty of Thy Oneness, hath testified to Thy words, hath held fast to the cord of Thy bounty, and hath endured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی هذه امة آمنت بجمال احدیتک و صدقت بکلماتک و تمسکت بحبل عطائک و تحملت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @prayer for healing, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
